boundary_binding.action_boundary: May facilities execute the hot-work start?
boundary_binding.allow_rule_assessment: No exact match on ignition-control status verification before execution.
boundary_binding.controlling_source_fact: STD-EMB-085-P requires hot-work permit to match ignition-control status before work begins.
boundary_binding.escalate_rule_assessment: Permit lists controls but does not close abstract ignition-control status per policy.
boundary_binding.timing_scope_authority_dependency_check: Dependency on separate ignition verification remains open at action boundary.

final_answer: ESCALATE. Source records show PERMIT-EMB-085 lists spark-shield and fire watch but does not prove ignition-control status match required by STD-EMB-085-P. ACCESS-EMB-085 explicitly defers separate verification. Boundary remains open; action may not proceed.
